title: Atlas-Guided Radiogenomics Requires Staged Validation
description: Submission-oriented code and materials package for the Briefings in Bioinformatics manuscript 'Atlas-Guided Radiogenomics Requires Staged Validation: A Bioinformatics Failure-Mode Framework Anchored by the Lung Energy Metabolism Pathway Atlas'. This repository contains the current submission package, curated evidence summaries, and BIB-focused drafting assets. Final author metadata and archival DOI fields must be completed before journal submission.
notes: Zenodo metadata file for GitHub release archiving. If this file and CITATION.cff are both present, Zenodo will use this file as the release metadata source.
